defs: a common weed with jointed stems (Polygonum aviculare); knotweed.
The dog grass. See under Dog.
quotes: We want a boy extremely for this function, Kept under for a year with milk and knotgrass.
notes: ☞ An infusion of Polygonum aviculare was once supposed to have the effect of stopping the growth of an animal, and hence it was called, as by Shakespeare, “hindering knotgrass.”
